project_type: TypeScript monorepo with Next.js 15 frontends, Fastify 5 backends, pnpm workspaces, Turborepo
build_system: pnpm 10 + Turborepo 2. Each app has its own turbo.json extending root. Apps build with `next build`. Packages build with `tsc`.
test_framework: Vitest with per-package configs. Root vitest.config.ts provides defaults. Frontend tests use jsdom environment, backend uses node.
verification_instructions: Run `pnpm turbo typecheck` then `pnpm turbo build` then `pnpm turbo test` then `pnpm turbo lint`
snapshot_or_generated_files: packages/database generates Prisma client via `prisma generate`. The dist/ folder is generated by tsc.
setup_instructions: pnpm install from monorepo root. Prisma generate for database package.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full npm access. Node 22 available. No Docker daemon needed for builds (Next.js standalone output). No live PostgreSQL for tests (use mocks).
contribution_requirements: ESLint config at root uses typescript-eslint. Many rules are turned off (no-unused-vars off, no-explicit-any off). no-console is enforced in source but not tests.
key_patterns: Apps follow pattern: Next.js frontend (src/app/ with App Router) + Fastify backend (backend/ dir). Package deps use workspace:*. Each app has turbo.json extending root. CSS uses Tailwind with quant design tokens (CSS vars). shared-ui provides all base components. Auth uses JWT with Bearer tokens verified by server-core auth plugin. Database uses Prisma with a large unified schema. All apps have same devDeps pattern (tailwind, postcss, autoprefixer, vitest).
directory_structure: Root: apps/ (16 app dirs), packages/ (85+ shared packages), services/ (8 infra services). Each app has: backend/, src/app/ (Next.js App Router), next.config.js, tailwind.config.ts, tsconfig.json, turbo.json, vitest.config.ts. Key packages: server-core (Fastify setup), database (Prisma), auth (JWT/sessions), shared-ui (React components), common (shared types).
